Documented Results

Every call posted
before the move.

No cherry picking. No backdating. Every entry is documented inside the community before the price moves — open for anyone to verify.

LLY — Eli Lilly
+72.2%

Pharma sector leader trading at a discount when called. GLP-1 pipeline was being underpriced by the market — called the entry, documented it in full, and held conviction through volatility. 72% in 3 months.

AMD — Advanced Micro Devices
+107.2%

Semiconductor leader with surging AI accelerator demand. Called the position when the market was underpricing AMD's data centre TAM — the fundamentals were obvious to anyone running a real model.

NBIS — Nebius Group
+110%

AI infrastructure leader severely undervalued relative to its GPU cloud buildout. Called when the market hadn't priced the runway — a classic early conviction play backed by a full DCF.

CRWD — CrowdStrike
+36.3%

The defining cybersecurity platform of the AI era. Enterprise security spend is non-discretionary — CRWD's platform consolidation story made it a must-hold with a clear intrinsic value case.

*All calls documented prior to price movement. Past performance is not indicative of future results.

Built for every level.

The Story

No degree.
No hedge fund.
Just the work.

I'm an electrician from Sydney who got sick of hearing "just trust me" from people with no skin in the game. So I spent years building my own system — one that mirrors how institutional investors actually think.

Every position I talk about is one I own. Every model I share is one I use. My track record is fully posted — no cherry picking, every call open for scrutiny.

⚡
Not a finance bro. A sparky who built an institutional research process from scratch and opened it to everyone.
📊
No astrology. No pump and dump. No noise. Just financial models, documented entries, and full transparency.
What's Inside Black Tier

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

01

Full DCF Analysis

Complete financial models with fair value estimates. The logic fully explained so you understand every number, not just the conclusion.

02

Live Watchlist

Real-time watchlist with documented entry prices and price targets — updated whenever my view on a position changes.

03

Earnings Breakdowns

Every earnings report broken down — what changed, what it means for the thesis, and whether to hold, add or cut.

04

Portfolio Construction

How to size positions, when to add, when to cut. The full conviction scoring framework behind every decision.

05

Direct 1-on-1 Access

Message me directly on anything — portfolio questions, thesis checks, position sizing. No topic is off limits.

06

Macro + Valuation

Top-down macro analysis combined with bottom-up financial modelling. The same two-layer approach used by institutions.

07

Education Framework

Valuation, margin of safety, conviction scoring — everything you need to build your own edge over time.

08

Serious Community

A private Discord with investors who discuss ideas at a level you won't find in public forums. Quality over quantity.
